headline: PTC Q2 Earnings & Revenues Beat on AI-Led ARR Strength, Shares Jump

headline: PTC Expands Hamilton Medical Partnership As AI And Valuation Draw Focus
summary: PTC (NasdaqGS:PTC) is expanding its relationship with Hamilton Medical, which is adopting PTC's Codebeamer ALM to replace legacy systems. The collaboration brings multiple PTC solutions into a regulated, mission-critical medical environment. This follows the recent launch of PTC's Windchill AI Assistant for product lifecycle management. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:PTC, this update sits at the intersection of software, industrial technology, and healthcare equipment. Hamilton Medical's...

headline: PTC Q2 Earnings Call Highlights

summary: PTC stock performance snapshot and recent context PTC (PTC) has seen mixed share price moves recently, with the stock down over the past month and past 3 months, while longer 3 year and 5 year total returns remain positive.
